authors: Henning Eichler Bernadette Uth Hannah Ötting Vanessa Kokoschka a Professor
Faculty of Computer Science and Media
raw_title: Debate Spaces for Everyone? How Public Service Media Aim to Reshape Audience Engagement and Interactions
title_en: Debate Spaces for Everyone? How Public Service Media Aim to Reshape Audience Engagement and Interactions
title_zh: 人人可参与的辩论空间？公共服务媒体如何重塑受众参与和互动
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨了公共服务媒体如何尝试创建让更多人参与的在线辩论空间，以改变人们与新闻媒体的互动方式。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how public service media are attempting to create online debate spaces that are more inclusive, aiming to transform how people interact with news media.
research_direction_zh: 数字时代公共服务媒体的角色转型与受众参与机制创新
research_direction_en: Transformation of public service media roles and innovation in audience engagement mechanisms in the digital age
